pages.raw_text:
The electrical workers profess to
be greatly pleased with the support
given them by all classes in their
fight with the Washington Water
Power company. They claim that
the company only operated four ex-
ira cars to Natatorium park last
Sunday and point to this fact as
proof mat the ban on that place is
becoming more effective. They ex-
pect to continue the fight until the
company sees that it is to their
advantage to permit their employees
to organize for mutual benefit and
protection. At the last meeting of
the Central Labor union the strik-
ers said that they had every rea-
son to feel satisfied with the prog
ress made up to date and that
there was absolutely no disposition
manifest to discontinue their eff
forts to obtain fair treatment from
the Water Power people.
